stages.concept:
# Unit 112: 배수사 + as + 원급 + as / 배수사 + 비교급 + than - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **배수 비교 표현**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **배수사 + as + 원급 + as** — ~의 …배만큼 ~한

> This room is **twice as large as** that one.
> 이 방은 저 방의 두 배만큼 크다.

> He earns **three times as much as** I do.
> 그는 나의 세 배만큼 번다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **배수사 + 비교급 + than** — ~보다 …배 더 ~한

> This room is **twice larger than** that one.
> 이 방은 저 방보다 두 배 더 크다.

> He is **three times richer than** me.
> 그는 나보다 세 배 더 부유하다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 배수사: **twice** (2배), **three times** (3배), **four times** (4배), **half** (절반)

> This bag is **half as expensive as** that one.
> 이 가방은 저 가방의 절반 가격이다.

**Q. 다음 문장의 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 단어를 고르세요.**
"This box is three (       ) as heavy as that one."
"I called her three (       ) yesterday."
1. time
2. times ✅
3. twice

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요. 'times'는 '~배'라는 뜻의 배수사로 쓰이기도 하고, '~번'이라는 횟수를 나타낼 때 쓰이기도 한답니다. 문맥에 따라 해석이 달라질 수 있어요.

🧑‍🎓 학생: twice as ~ as(2배만큼), three times 비교급 than(3배 더)! 두 가지 형태를 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 112: 배수사+as+원급+as, 배수사+비교급+than - 연습문제 A

**01.** 다음 중 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Cats sleep (     ) as much as people.
> **정답** twice (two times)

---

**02.** This bag is ? as heavy as that one.
> **정답** three times

---

**03.** My room is ? bigger than yours.
> **정답** twice (two times)

---

**04.** He earns ? as much as I do.
> **정답** three times

---

**05.** This building is ? taller than that one.
> **정답** five times

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
This is twice as expensive that one.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** expensive that → expensive as that

---

**07.** He is three time as tall as me.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** time → times

---

**08.** This box is twice more heavy than that one.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** more heavy → heavier

---

**09.** She reads two times as many book as me.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** book → books

---

**10.** This river is three times as long that one.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** long that → long as that

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
이 가방은 저것보다 두 배 더 비싸다.
This bag is expensive than that one.
> **정답** twice as, as (또는 twice more)

---

**12.** 그는 나보다 세 배 더 많이 먹는다.
He eats as much as I do.
> **정답** three times

---

**13.** 이 방은 저것보다 두 배 더 크다.
This room is bigger than that one.
> **정답** twice (two times)

---

**14.** 그녀는 나보다 네 배 더 많은 책을 읽는다.
She reads as many books as I do.
> **정답** four times

---

**15.** 이 건물은 저것보다 세 배 더 높다.
This building is taller than that one.
> **정답** three times

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
이 나무는 저것보다 두 배 더 높다.
This tree twice is as tall as that one
> **정답** This / tree / is / twice / as / tall / as / that / one

---

**17.** 그는 나보다 세 배 더 빠르다.
He three is times faster than me
> **정답** He / is / three / times / faster / than / me

---

**18.** 이 상자는 저것보다 두 배 더 무겁다.
This box twice is as heavy as that one
> **정답** This / box / is / twice / as / heavy / as / that / one

---

**19.** 그녀는 나보다 두 배 더 많이 공부한다.
She studies twice as much as I do
> **정답** She / studies / twice / as / much / as / I / do

---

**20.** 이 강은 저것보다 다섯 배 더 길다.
This river five is times longer than that one
> **정답** This / river / is / five / times / longer / than / that / one
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 112: 배수사+as+원급+as  배수사+비교급+than - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
This bike is three times as _____________ as that one.
This bike is three times ______________ than that
one.
cheaper - cheap
cheap - cheap
cheaper - cheaper
cheap - cheaper
> **정답** cheap - cheaper

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
He has twice as _______________ books as I do.
But my books are five times __________________
than his.
more - more interesting
most - the more interesting
many - more interesting
many - most interesting
> **정답** many - more interesting

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을
고르시오.
My grandparents' house is three times as __________
as mine.
My house is three times __________ than my
grandparents'.
big - more small
bigger - more small
bigger - smaller
big - smaller
> **정답** big - smaller

---

**04.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Math textbook is twice as thick as English
textbook.
Amy's hair is twice as long as Tom's.
My dog barks three times more often than her
dog.
She can ski three times as better as her sister
and brothers.
> **정답** She can ski three times as better as her sister and
brothers.

---

**05.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Tom's luggage was three times as heavier as
mine.
My sister's room is twice as dirty as the living
room.
Amy's house is three times larger than her
previous house.
I know about him twice as much as you do.
> **정답** Tom's luggage was three times as heavier as mine.

---

**06.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
그 노트북은 내가 생각했던 것보다 세 배 더 비쌌다.
The laptop was three times as expensive as I
thought.
The laptop was three times more expensive
than I thought.
The laptop was three times expensiver than I
thought.
The laptop was three times more expensive as
I thought.
> **정답** The laptop was three times more expensive than I
thought., The laptop was three times as expensive as
I thought.

---

**07.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
산악은 조깅보다 다섯 배나 더 힘들다.
Mountain climbing is five times as more tiring
as jogging.
Mountain climbing is five times as tiring than
jogging.
Mountain climbing is five times more tiring
than jogging.
Mountain climbing is five times as tiring as
jogging.
> **정답** Mountain climbing is five times as tiring as jogging.,
Mountain climbing is five times more tiring than
jogging.

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오. (2개)
나에게는, 거미가 뱀보다 열배 더 무섭다.
To me, spiders are ten times as scarier than
snakes.
To me, spiders are ten times scarier than
snakes.
To me, spiders are ten times more scary than
snakes.
To me, spiders are ten times as scary as
snakes.
> **정답** To me, spiders are ten times as scary as snakes., To
me, spiders are ten times scarier than snakes.

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
I like bitter coffee ten times better than sweet
coffee.
Her idea about school rule was twice as well
as his idea.
My older brother is three times as taller than
my young brother.
Tom has twice as much friends as Amy.
• bitter (맛)이 쓴
> **정답** I like bitter coffee ten times better than sweet coffee.

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
She takes a shower twice more often than her
sister.
The man drives three times as fast as other
drivers.
Fire is twice as more dangerous as water.
Tom is handsome twice as more as his father.
> **정답** The man drives three times as fast as other drivers.

---

**11.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때 빈 칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
고르시오.
영어는 수학보다 두 배는 더 어렵다.
English is ____________________________ math.
twice as difficult than
twice more difficult than
two as difficult as
twice as difficult as
> **정답** twice as difficult as

---

**12.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때 빈 칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을
모두 고르시오. (2개)
이 털 코트는 저 자켓보다 세 배는 더 따뜻하다.
This fur coat is ___________________________ that
jacket.
three times as warm as
three times warm than
three times warmer than
three times warmer as
> **정답** three times warmer than, three times as warm as

---

**13.** 다음 문장과 같은 의미가 되도록 빈 칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오.
Tom's computer is three times as fast as mine.
Tom's computer is
mine.
> **정답** three, times, faster, than

---

**14.** 다음 문장과 같은 의미가 되도록 빈 칸에 알맞은 말을
쓰시오.
The TV in the living room is three times wider than
the TV in my room.
The TV in the living room is
the TV in my room.
> **정답** three, times, as, wide, as

---

**15.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
Her voice is ten times clearer than other
speakers.
I can swim twice as faster as Tom can.
Babies sleep five times as much as adults.
Amy's handwriting is twice as neat than
Tom's handwriting.
> **정답** I can swim twice as faster as Tom can., Amy's
handwriting is twice as neat than Tom's
handwriting.

---

**16.** 다음 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 모두 고르시오.
[2개]
He could hold his breath twice as long as his
friends.
Amy has eight times as more shoes as her
sisters.
This dish is six times more spicy than her dish.
Tom works three times harder than other
workers in the office.
> **정답** This dish is six times more spicy than her dish.,
Amy has eight times as more shoes as her
sisters.

---

**17.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Rock climbing is ten times as
more dangerous as mountain
climbing.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** more dangerous → dangerous

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
Amy finished her homework twice
earlier than Tom.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** earlier than → as early as

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
My brother ate three times
much than I did.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** much → more

---

**20.** 밑줄 친 부분 중 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
[2개]
Tom doesn't like to go anywhere by bus. He thinks
the subway is twice as fast as the bus. He
also thinks the subway is three times more
comfortable as the bus. But, Amy thinks
differently. She thinks the subway is much
noisy than the bus. She also thinks there are
more bus stops than subway stations.
> **정답** twice, than, noisier, than
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 112 배수사+as+원급+as  배수사+비교급+than중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오. (원급 사용)
오늘 점심은 어제 점심보다 두 배 더 맛있었다.
힌트 (     ) delicious
Today's lunch was  (     )   (     )   (     )  
yesterday's lunch.
정답 twice, as, delicious, as

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오. (비교급 사용)
소설은 에세이보다 열 배 더 흥미롭다.
힌트 (     ) interesting
A novel is  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  an
essay.
정답 ten, times, more, interesting, than

---

**03.** 우리말에 맞게 문장을 완성하시오. (원급 사용)
나는 Amy보다 두 배 빨리 숙제를 끝냈다.
힌트 (     ) fast
I finished my homework  (     )   (     )  
 Amy.
정답 twice, as, fast, as

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오. (필요시
형태를 변형할 것)
이 수영장이 저 수영장보다 세 배 더 깊다.
힌트 (     ) deep, three times, that pool, than
This pool is  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 three, times, deeper, than, that, pool

---

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 괄호 안의 말을 배열하여 쓰시오.
내게는 우정이 사랑보다 두 배는 더 중요하다.
힌트 (     ) as, twice, love, as, important
To me, friendship is  (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 twice, as, important, as, love

---

**06.** 어법상 틀린 부분을 모두 찾아 다시 쓰시오. (원급 표현)
I bought two times as more pens as my brother
did.
→I bought  (     )  my
brother did.
정답 twice as many pens as

---

**07.** 어법상 틀린 부분을 모두 찾아 다시 쓰시오. (비교급 표현)
This ladder is three long than that ladder.
→This ladder is 
that ladder.
정답 three times longer than

---

**08.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오. (필요시 형태를 변형할 것)
three times, boring
A: Is your book interesting?
B: No, it is  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  than yours.
정답 three, times, more, boring

---

**09.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오. (필요시 형태를 변형할 것)
twice, fast
A: Shall we take a bus to the concert hall?
B: we're going to take the subway. The subway is
  (     )   (     )  as the bus.
정답 twice, as, fast

---

**10.** 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문에 대답하는 문장을
완성하시오. (필요시 형태를 변형할 것)
three times, many
A: Did you catch a lot of fish last week?
B: Yes, I caught  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  than
my friends.
정답 three, times, more, fish

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 112: 배수사+as+원급+as / 배수사+비교급+than - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
This bag is three times as _____________ as that one.
This bag is three times ______________ than that one. cheaper - cheap cheap - cheap cheaper - cheaper cheap - cheaper
> 정답: cheap - cheaper

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
She has twice as _______________ items as I do.
But my items are five times __________________ than hers. more - more valuable most - the more valuable many - more valuable many - most valuable
> 정답: many - more valuable

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 순서대로 알맞게 짝지어진 것을 고르시오.
My uncle's house is three times as __________ as mine.
My house is three times __________ than my uncle's. big - more small bigger - more small bigger - smaller big - smaller
> 정답: big - smaller

---

**04.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
The math book is twice as thick as the English book.
Amy's hair is twice as long as Tom's.
My cat sleeps three times more often than her cat.
She can ski three times as better as her brother and sister.
> 정답: She can ski three times as better as her brother and

---

**05.** 다음 중 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Tom's backpack was three times as heavier as mine.
My brother's room is twice as messy as the living room.
Amy's house is three times larger than her previous house.
I know about her twice as much as you do.
> 정답: Tom's backpack was three times as heavier as mine.

---

**06.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) 그 카메라는 내가 생각했던 것보다 세 배 더 비쌌다.
The camera was three times as expensive as I thought.
The camera was three times more expensive than I thought.
The camera was three times expensiver than I thought.
The camera was three times more expensive as I thought.
> 정답: The camera was three times more expensive than I

---

**07.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) 등산은 달리기보다 다섯 배나 더 힘들다.
Hiking is five times as more tiring as running.
Hiking is five times as tiring than running.
Hiking is five times more tiring than running.
Hiking is five times as tiring as running.
> 정답: Hiking is five times as tiring as running.,

---

**08.** 다음 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 모두 고르시오.
(2개) 나에게는, 벌이 쥐보다 열배 더 무섭다.
To me, bees are ten times as scarier than mice.
To me, bees are ten times scarier than mice.
To me, bees are ten times more scary than mice.
To me, bees are ten times as scary as mice.
> 정답: To me, bees are ten times as scary as mice., To

---

**09.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
I like green tea ten times better than black tea.
Her plan about the project was twice as well as his plan.
My older sister is three times as taller than my younger sister.
Tom has twice as much friends as Amy.
> 정답: I like green tea ten times better than black tea.

---

**10.** 다음 중 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
She eats lunch twice more often than her sister.
The boy runs three times as fast as other runners.
Ice is twice as more dangerous as rain.
Tom is handsome twice as more as his brother.
> 정답: The boy runs three times as fast as other runners.

---

**11.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때 빈 칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
과학은 미술보다 두 배는 더 어렵다.
Science is ____________________________ art. twice as difficult than twice more difficult than two as difficult as twice as difficult as
> 정답: twice as difficult as
